================================================================================
                              RESUME
================================================================================

MARIA ELENA RODRIGUEZ GONZALEZ
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Cincinnati, OH 45202 | mrodriguez.marketing@gmail.com | (513) 555-0287
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/mariaelenarodriguezg
Portfolio: mariarodriguezmarketing.com

================================================================================
                         PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
================================================================================

Results-driven marketing leader with 12 years of progressive experience in 
hospitality and consumer brand marketing. Proven track record of developing 
and executing integrated marketing strategies that have driven measurable 
revenue growth, increased brand awareness, and improved guest satisfaction 
scores. Led marketing teams of up to 12 professionals and managed budgets 
exceeding $4 million annually. Experienced in luxury hospitality, lifestyle 
brands, and multi-property portfolio management. Skilled at leveraging data 
analytics to optimize campaign performance and demonstrate clear ROI. 
Bilingual English and Spanish with experience in international market 
development.

================================================================================
                            EDUCATION
================================================================================

UNIVERSITY OF CINCINNATI                                    Cincinnati, OH
Master of Business Administration (MBA)                     Graduated: May 2016
Concentration: Marketing Strategy
• Graduate Marketing Association, President 2015-2016
• Capstone Project: Digital Transformation Strategy for Regional Hotel Chain
• Part-time program completed while working full-time
• GPA: 3.87/4.0

OHIO STATE UNIVERSITY                                       Columbus, OH
Bachelor of Science in Business Administration               Graduated: May 2012
Major: Marketing | Minor: Spanish
• Dean's List, 6 semesters
• Marketing Club, Vice President
• First-generation college graduate
• Worked 25+ hours/week to fund education

================================================================================
                         PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
================================================================================

MIDWEST HOSPITALITY PARTNERS                                   Cincinnati, OH
Vice President of Marketing                                 April 2021 - Present
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Lead all marketing functions for hospitality management company operating 
14 hotels across Ohio, Kentucky, and Indiana including full-service properties, 
boutique hotels, and extended-stay brands under Marriott, Hilton, and IHG flags.

Key Achievements:
• Increased portfolio-wide RevPAR by 18% through strategic repositioning and 
  targeted digital marketing campaigns, contributing $4.2M in incremental revenue
• Built and lead team of 12 marketing professionals including digital 
  specialists, content creators, graphic designers, and property marketers
• Manage annual marketing budget of $4.3 million with full P&L responsibility; 
  achieved 112% ROMI in 2023 through optimized channel mix
• Spearheaded company-wide rebrand of flagship boutique collection, including 
  new visual identity, website redesign, and brand standards documentation
• Launched loyalty program integration strategy resulting in 34% increase in 
  direct bookings and 22% improvement in repeat guest rate
• Developed centralized CRM strategy using Salesforce Marketing Cloud, 
  creating unified guest profiles across all properties
• Implemented comprehensive social media strategy across 14 properties, 
  growing combined following from 45K to 187K in 24 months
• Led crisis communications during COVID-19, developing safety messaging 
  that maintained brand trust and supported recovery efforts
• Established partnerships with local CVBs and tourism boards, securing 
  over $600K in co-op marketing funds annually
• Introduced A/B testing framework for email campaigns, improving open rates 
  by 28% and click-through rates by 41%

Direct Reports: 12 (3 senior managers, 9 specialists/coordinators)

Technologies: Salesforce Marketing Cloud, Adobe Analytics, Google Analytics 4, 
Tableau, Revinate, ReviewPro, Amadeus Demand360, Sprout Social, Asana, 
Monday.com, Adobe Creative Suite

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GRAND AMERICAN HOTELS                                          Chicago, IL
Director of Marketing                                       July 2017 - March 2021
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Led marketing for portfolio of 6 upper-upscale and luxury hotels in Chicago 
and Milwaukee markets, reporting to SVP of Sales & Marketing.

Key Achievements:
• Developed and executed annual marketing plans with combined budget of 
  $2.8 million, consistently exceeding occupancy and ADR targets
• Led team of 8 marketing professionals across brand marketing, digital, 
  and creative functions
• Launched successful influencer marketing program partnering with 75+ 
  travel and lifestyle creators, generating 12M+ impressions and $1.8M in 
  attributed revenue
• Redesigned flagship property website, improving organic traffic by 67% 
  and conversion rate by 2.3 percentage points
• Implemented comprehensive SEO strategy achieving first-page rankings for 
  85% of target keywords within 12 months
• Managed PR relationships resulting in features in Travel + Leisure, 
  Condé Nast Traveler, and Chicago Tribune travel section
• Developed Spanish-language marketing materials targeting growing Latin 
  American travel market, contributing to 23% increase in international bookings
• Created employee brand ambassador program reducing reliance on external 
  content creation and improving authentic engagement
• Led successful soft brand launch for boutique conversion property, 
  achieving 98% target RevPAR within first 6 months

Technologies: HubSpot, Google Analytics, Hootsuite, Cvent, Opera PMS, 
Revinate, Medallia, Adobe Creative Suite

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

RIVERSIDE RESORT & CONVENTION CENTER                           Louisville, KY
Senior Marketing Manager                                    August 2014 - June 2017
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Managed marketing operations for 850-room convention hotel with full-service 
spa, golf course, and 125,000 sq ft of meeting space.

Key Achievements:
• Increased wedding and social event bookings by 42% through targeted 
  digital advertising and partnerships with wedding planning platforms
• Managed marketing budget of $1.4 million and team of 4 marketing 
  coordinators and specialists
• Developed meeting planner nurture program generating $2.1M in group 
  RFP responses annually
• Led complete refresh of property collateral including brand photography, 
  event brochures, and digital assets
• Implemented email automation workflows reducing manual campaign creation 
  time by 60% while improving personalization
• Managed reputation on TripAdvisor and Google, improving property rating 
  from 3.8 to 4.4 stars through proactive guest engagement
• Coordinated grand opening marketing for $12M spa renovation, achieving 
  85% capacity within first quarter

Technologies: Salesforce, Marketo, TripAdvisor Business, Google Ads, 
Facebook Business Manager, Cvent

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

HERITAGE HOTELS OF AMERICA                                     Columbus, OH
Marketing Coordinator                                       June 2012 - July 2014
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Entry-level role supporting marketing team at regional hotel management 
company with 8 properties.

Key Contributions:
• Supported development and execution of seasonal marketing campaigns
• Managed social media accounts for 4 properties, establishing consistent 
  brand voice and content calendar
• Coordinated tradeshows and industry conferences including HSMAI and MPI
• Analyzed campaign performance data and prepared monthly marketing reports
• Assisted with website content updates and email newsletter creation
• Supported media events and FAM trips for travel journalists
